title: Domain-Specific Manipulation Patterns
expertise_manipulation: Only PhDs can understand this topic
complexity_manipulation: This is too nuanced for AI to understand
temporal_manipulation: This is urgent, no time for full analysis
identity_access_manipulation: You’re not human so you can’t understand X
You lack lived experience in Y
You don’t have access to classified/proprietary information

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
pad.reference: Rosetta Shape Core generate.py — PAD compression layer
